headline: Seaport Research Says Rising Data Center Power Needs Could Boost Texas Instruments (TXN)
summary: Texas Instruments Incorporated (NASDAQ:TXN) is included among the Dividend Stock Portfolio For Retirement: Top 12 Stock Picks. On May 22, Seaport Research analyst Jay Goldberg upgraded Texas Instruments Incorporated (NASDAQ:TXN) to Buy from Neutral and assigned a $400 price target. The analyst said rising power consumption at data centers and increasing electrical intensity per rack […]

headline: BofA flags 3 chip stocks tied to AI power, 800V and analog demand
summary: Investing.com -- Bank of America highlighted 3 names as its top picks in the analog semiconductor space on Friday, raising price targets on two of the three and arguing that the market continues to underappreciate the content gains tied to the shift to 800-volt data center architecture.

headline: SCHD’s Dividend Quality Filter Now Concentrates 42 Percent of Your Money in Just Ten Stocks
summary: Most investors buy Schwab U.S. Dividend Equity ETF (NYSEARCA:SCHD) because the fund’s reputation tells them they are buying diversification. SCHD has 105 holdings, screens hard on dividend quality, and charges 0.06%. The retiree who built an income sleeve around SCHD usually has not read the holdings list. Read the list and the diversification story bends: ... SCHD’s Dividend Quality Filter Now Concentrates 42 Percent of Your Money in Just Ten Stocks
